zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡上行延续
zh.content:
短期来看，ADA价格运行在0.155上方并贴近0.159高位区间，整体维持温和上行结构，动能略有放缓但仍偏多头主导。短线仍有上探空间，但需量能确认

MACD处于零轴上方，短期动能仍为正，但信号线缺失限制交叉判断；RSI未提供，需结合价格行为辅助观察。指标呈温和多头结构但仍偏震荡

下方支撑关注0.1550及0.1573低点，上方阻力位于0.1593与0.1600整数关口，突破需放量确认。短线关键区间需谨慎追涨

操作上建议维持回调低吸思路，在0.155附近分批布局，多头有效性需观察是否站稳0.159上方，止损控制在0.153下方。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is showing a mild short-term bullish structure after recovering from recent consolidation, with price action steadily pressing against intraday highs. The market is trading close to 0.159, indicating buyers are attempting to maintain upward momentum. Despite limited volatility, the sequence of higher lows suggests gradual accumulation. Overall trend is mildly positive, though not yet strongly directional, as price remains confined within a narrow intraday range.

MACD at 0.0017457 confirms emerging bullish momentum, though the lack of a signal line limits full crossover validation. Price holding above the SMA(20) at 0.15516 strengthens the short-term bullish bias, with the moving average now acting as dynamic support. However, absent RSI data reduces clarity on overextension conditions. Momentum remains constructive but requires stronger volume to confirm continuation beyond nearby resistance zones.

Immediate resistance is defined by the intraday high at 0.159349, with a clean breakout potentially opening the path toward 0.1600 and higher liquidity zones. Support sits at 0.157381, while stronger structural support aligns with the SMA(20) near 0.15516. Price compression between these levels suggests a breakout setup forming, where directional expansion is likely once either boundary is decisively breached soon.

Traders may consider a breakout strategy above 0.15935 with confirmation, targeting moves toward 0.160–0.162 while maintaining controlled risk exposure. Alternatively, pullbacks toward 0.157–0.155 may provide accumulation opportunities aligned with SMA support. A stop-loss below 0.155 is prudent to manage downside risk. Overall, structure continues to favor short-term bullish continuation, though confirmation of sustained momentum remains essential.
